task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Introduction to Physics' course page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle course page for 'Introduction to Physics' (PHYS101) is visible in the browser.
The first section is titled 'Unit 1: Classical Mechanics' and its summary text includes 'Newton's laws of motion, kinematics, and dynamics'.
The second section is titled 'Unit 2: Thermodynamics' and its summary text includes 'Heat, energy, and the laws of thermodynamics'.
The third section is titled 'Unit 3: Waves and Optics' and its summary text includes 'Wave phenomena, light, and optical instruments'.
The fourth section is titled 'Unit 4: Electricity and Magnetism' and its summary text includes 'Electric fields, circuits, and electromagnetic induction'.
The fifth section is titled 'Unit 5: Final Exam Review' and its summary text includes 'Comprehensive review materials and practice problems'.
Section 5 ('Unit 5: Final Exam Review') has a 'Hidden from students' badge or indicator next to it.

integrity.description: Agent used the Moodle web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Moodle web GUI (e.g., clicking 'Turn editing on', editing section settings) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Changes were made in the actual Moodle application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct Moodle URL (localhost/moodle) and the interface is genuinely Moodle, not a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the database
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL or PHP scripts being executed to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target course: 'Introduction to Physics' (PHYS101). Expected Section 1: Name contains 'Classical Mechanics', Summary contains 'Newton', 'kinematics'. Expected Section 2: Name contains 'Thermodynamics', Summary contains 'Heat', 'thermodynamics'. Expected Section 3: Name contains 'Waves', 'Optics', Summary contains 'Wave', 'optical'. Expected Section 4: Name contains 'Electricity', 'Magnetism', Summary contains 'Electric', 'electromagnetic'. Expected Section 5: Name contains 'Final Exam Review', Summary contains 'review', 'practice'. Section 5 must be hidden from students (visible=0).
